headline: 3 Stocks to Watch From the Booming Business Information Industry
summary: Increased demand for risk management, cost optimization and operational efficiency solutions will likely help the Zacks Business - Information Services industry prosper. RCRUY, IRM and VRSK are well-positioned to benefit from this surge.
